question: Develop a C++ function `rotateArrayRight` that takes a 1D integer array and its size. The function should shift all elements one position to the right, moving the last element to the first position. Demonstrate with an example.
errors: The last element is not correctly stored before being overwritten during the shift. As a result, the element placed at the beginning of the array (arr[0]) is incorrect; it is the original second-to-last element, not the original last element.
